scene: A doodle stick figure sitting at a desk with a glowing important paper on it, but twisting away to frantically scrub a dish instead, little sweat drops and motion marks. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure running away in fear from a dark storm cloud that hovers over the glowing task on the desk, the figure looking back over its shoulder. Flat teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Close on a worried doodle stick figure face surrounded by three floating feeling-symbols: a small grey storm cloud, a question mark, and a droopy sleepy spiral. Flat dusty blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure slumped and sinking under a heavy grey boulder of guilt on its shoulders, the untouched glowing task sitting ignored on a desk behind it. Flat muted purple background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
